welcome:
Hello {name}! 👋
Welcome to Market Watcher Bot.
Please choose an option from the menu below.
ask_link: Please send me the valid product URL link you want to track.
empty_list: ℹ️ Your tracking list is currently empty.
help_text:
🤖 Market Watcher Bot Help:

Use the menu below to navigate.
• '➕ Add New Link' to track a new product.
• '📋 My Links' to see and manage your list.
already_tracked: ⚠️ You are already tracking this product!
invalid_url: ❌ Invalid URL format! Please send a valid internet link.
use_menu: Please use the menu buttons to navigate options.
del_success:
🗑️ Product successfully removed from your list!

Link: {url}
del_not_found: ⚠️ This item could not be found or was already deleted.
del_error: ❌ An error occurred while trying to remove this item.
err_not_found: ❌ Could not extract the product ID from the URL.
err_out_of_stock: ⚠️ This product is currently out of stock or unavailable.
err_no_price: ❌ Price not found in the product data.
err_connection: ❌ Connection error while trying to fetch data from the store.
